holdings.infoBox: CARZ is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 8.44%, Advanced Micro Devices at 7.39%, Intel at 6.69%, Samsung Electronics at 5.44%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.03%.

overview.description: The First Trust S-Network Future Vehicles & Technology ETF (CARZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index that provides exposure to electric and autonomous vehicles and the technology essential for the supply and production of these vehicles. Securities are selected and weighted by market-cap. CARZ was launched on May 9, 2011 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: S-Network Electric & Future Vehicle Ecosystem Index
